overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction video game showing a character exploring a futuristic commercial interior. The character walks through a blue-lit corporate lounge and reception area, then stops to observe a large alien sea creature displayed in a preservation tank.

scene_state.functional_zone: corporate waiting lounge with white seating

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the lounge area toward the reception desk

entered.detail: modern white sofa with curved design in the waiting area
large framed poster with planet image and 'LOST STATION' text
large black rectangular screen mounted on the blue wall
low white cabinet with drawers beneath the wall screen
vertical neon light strip running floor to ceiling
tall green plant in a white geometric planter

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a futuristic lounge area with white sofas and deep blue walls. Neon light pillars illuminate the space while a large 'Lost Station' poster hangs on the right wall. The camera follows from behind as the character moves across the carpeted floor toward the reception area.

scene_state.functional_zone: reception desk area with service counter

events.description: moves from carpeted lounge to tiled reception area with service desk

agents.ego_description: walking past the reception desk where a worker is seated at a computer terminal

notable_agents.action: worker with blonde hair sitting at desk working on computer

entered.detail: long curved counter with computer terminals and office equipment
illuminated wall sign with 'XENOFRESH seafood' text in white letters
tall vertical poster with purple and blue graphics advertising travel

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the reception desk where a worker sits at a computer terminal. The Xenofresh Seafood sign becomes visible on the blue wall behind the counter, and the floor transitions to light-colored tiles. The character walks past the seated employee and the curved reception counter.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial counter area with large display

events.description: continues walking past the reception desk toward the large aquarium display

agents.ego_description: walking along the counter toward the large display tank at the end of the room

entered.detail: tall rectangular glass display tank with metal frame and circular lights

segments.scene_description: Moving past the reception area, the character walks along the commercial counter toward a large display structure. The aquarium tank comes into view on the left side, revealing a preserved creature inside. The character continues forward as the reception desk falls behind and the tank grows larger in the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: display area with large preservation tank

events.description: stops walking to observe the alien creature floating in the display tank

agents.ego_description: standing still and examining the large alien sea creature preserved in the display tank

notable_agents.action: large pale alien sea creature floating suspended in the preservation tank

entered.detail: doorway with red exit sign above leading to corridor

segments.scene_description: The character stops in front of the large aquarium tank to observe the alien creature floating inside. The display is backlit with blue lighting, showing the preserved sea creature with tentacles and a large body. An exit door with a red sign is visible to the left as the character remains stationary, examining the exhibit in detail.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sleek corporate lounge that gradually transitions into a commercial seafood exhibit. It begins by following the character from behind through a blue-walled lounge area with white sofas and neon light pillars, passing a Lost Station poster on the right. As the character moves forward, the carpeted floor shifts to light-colored tiles upon approaching a reception desk where a worker sits beneath a Xenofresh Seafood sign. The scene then expands as the camera glides past the curved counter and along a commercial walkway, bringing a massive aquarium tank into view on the left. Finally, the character comes to a halt in front of the blue-backlit display to observe a preserved alien sea creature with tentacles, with a red exit sign visible in the periphery.
